items.example: In the near future, we may be able to communicate in any language.
In the long term, 3D printers will make copies of body parts.
In the short term, we expect profits to increase.
The headset could come onto the market in a year or two.
In ten years' time, I hope to be a doctor.
Climate change will affect farming in the next thirty years.
Vertical farming will become common in cities.
Tiny nano monitors will be placed inside our bodies.
Full immersion virtual reality will be with us in ten to twenty years.
3D printers will make copies of human organs.
